text:
Orzny (オルズニー, Oruzunī) is a member of Queen Unma's Royal Guard. He spied on Prince Halkenburg, but was recalled back to Prince Benjamin. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 36, Chapter 375 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

Upon Halkenburg's return from the departure banquet, Halkenburg's bodyguards are seen lying unconscious on the floor. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 35, Chapter 362 However, later that day, the bodyguards are shown to be fine. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 35, Chapter 366 

Following Kurapika's broadcast on the emergency channel, Benjamin orders the members of his own private army to work in shifts with Queen Unma's bodyguards to monitor the other Princes. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 35, Chapter 363 Orzny is thus removed from Prince Halkenburg's guard and assigned to Benjamin. 

Shikaku, the soldier with whom he switched shifts, says that just like Halkenburg's own guards, Orzny also received a mark of the feather from Halkenburg's Guardian Spirit Beast, but that it disappeared after ten minutes. Shikaku speculates that the ability does not have any effect on those who, like Orzny, have no loyalty to Halkenburg. He further states that like the other guards, Orzny has no memory of receiving the mark, guessing that it involves memory revision from a Manipulator attack.
